title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO, and M.G. Siegler discusses the timing and implications of the company going public before OpenAI. The discussion covers whether Claude is at peak performance and whether Anthropic actually needs the capital.
